etymology.description: semantic 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass") + phonetic 耦(耦) (ǒu) -> lotus root
etymology.interpretation: The character 藕 (ǒu, "lotus root") combines the semantic component 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass") to indicate a plant-related concept, with 耦(耦) (ǒu) providing the phonetic sound. The character is used for the 'lotus root,' a plant part commonly associated with aquatic grass-like environments.

examples.chinese: 莲藕(蓮藕)可以用来煮汤(可以用來煮湯)。
examples.pinyin: Liánǒu kěyǐ yòng lái zhǔ tāng.
examples.english: Lotus root can be used to make soup.

examples.chinese: 切好的藕片(切好的藕片)可以用作凉拌菜(可以用作涼拌菜)。
examples.pinyin: Qiē hǎo de ǒupiàn kěyǐ yòng zuò liángbàncài.
examples.english: Sliced lotus root can be used as a cold dish.

examples.chinese: 藕的质地脆嫩可口(藕的質地脆嫩可口)，适合各种烹饪方式(適合各種烹飪方式)。
examples.pinyin: Ǒu de zhìdì cuì nèn kěkǒu, shìhé gèzhǒng pēngrèn fāngshì.
examples.english: The texture of lotus root is crispy and tender, suitable for various cooking methods.
